title: Peppery Ukrainian Oats Hash
description: A snappy, whole30-friendly dish featuring ground oats, perfect for meal prep and a quick breakfast or lunch

ingredients.name: Cured pork belly
ingredients.notes: or substitute with Canadian bacon or prosciutto

instructions: Preheat the broiler to high heat. In a large bowl, combine ground oats, cured pork belly, diced onion, minced garlic, and a pinch of salt. Mix well to combine. Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and drizzle with olive oil. Broil for 5-7 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and crispy. Remove from the oven and stir in smoked paprika and black pepper. Let cool slightly before serving. In a small bowl, whisk together beaten eggs and water. Pour the egg mixture over the oat mixture and use a spatula to gently fold the eggs into the oats. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to set.
Serve the oat hash chilled, garnished with additional black pepper if desired.
